race.comment: NINETYFIVEINAFIFTY (11) switches to synthetic for the first time and comes here in good form, placing in town behind a smart one two back at Caulfield Heath before an even effort on heavy ground at Sandown. This suits ideally.  BEAUTIFUL BEVY (8) is back from a spell of five months. She hasn't shown much in two runs to date but they've been in handy maidens and she's jumped out well, respecting in a race that's fallen a way a touch post scratchings. FINAL COMMAND (2) debuted on heavy ground at Horsham and was sent out a warm favourite but can be excused on that ground, pulling up with post race issues. Look for sharp improvement.  CONISTON SPICE (9) struggled at Echuca but had been going okay prior and is in the mix.
